title: Reed Diffuser for Home with Sticks, Aromatherapy Essential Oils, Natural Ingredients, Long Lasting Fragrance, Made in the UK (Lavender) - Valentte
features: LASTING FRAGRANCE: Heavily scented with natural essential oils for a long-lasting, powerful fragrance throw that will fill your space with warming fragrance.
RELAXING: Each scent has been carefully blended with aromatherapy properties that will help improve your emotional health and well-being. Remarkable blend of power and captivating fragrance.
LIGHT & FLORAL: Lavender has a fresh, sweet aroma that is soothing and refreshing. It’s great for winding down at bedtime, yet also has balancing properties for boosting stamina and energy.

HAPPY & UPLIFTING: A therapeutic blend of eight pure essential oils specifically designed and carefully selected to work in harmony to uplift your mood, infusing every moment with a sense of unparalleled positivity and vitality.
MADE IN THE UK: We hand-make natural, uplifting treats and gifts to make you and your loved ones feel good. Always natural, organic where we can and beautifully packaged.
description: Product Description Wax Melts ✓ Our wax melts smell incredible, look beautiful and they actually work! ✓ Choose your favourite fragrance or try a scent selection with one of our mixed sets. ✓ A beautiful treat for you, or the perfect gift for your loved one. Candles ✓ We understand how disappointing it can be to buy candles that smell fantastic in the shop, only to find that you can’t actually smell them when you burn them at home. ✓ Our candles are different. Infused with 100% essential oils for a natural authentic scent and a powerful fragrance throw. Reed Diffusers ✓ We believe everybody should be surrounded by natural essential oils with aromatherapy properties that improve your emotional health and wellbeing. ✓ Reed Diffusers are a great way to fill your space with beautiful fragrance and positive therapeutic benefits. Gift Sets ✓ We've combined our favourite Valentte products to make the perfect gifts for your loved ones. ✓ Hand-crafted and wrapped in a luxurious Gift Box to make your present extra special.
